empty.blog.consultation: There is no blog yet. Be patient! Exciting topics are about to flood this page.
empty.blog.consultation.title: It's a bit quiet here...
empty.blog.creation: Going on a language trip and want to share all your adventures? Become a trainee reporter! Alone or with others, easily publish and share texts, photos and videos.
empty.blog.creation.title: Launch your first blog!
empty.blog.filter: There are no results. Check new filters to display your blogs.
empty.blog.subfolder.title: This folder is empty...
empty.calendar: Forget USB drives! The File Sender app lets you store large documents online and access them anywhere, for 30 days.
empty.calendar.consultation: No one has shared a calendar with you yet. A good reason to stay in your hammock!
empty.calendar.consultation.title: Feels like a holiday…
empty.calendar.creation: With the Calendar app, manage your schedule, create events, invite participants and find all your meetings.
empty.calendar.creation.title: Organise your days like a pro!
empty.collaborativeeditor.consultation: With the Collaborative Pad app, you can easily contribute to writing a lesson or a presentation and chat directly. In a word, indispensable!
empty.collaborativeeditor.creation: A group project due in a week? With the Collaborative Pad app, write your texts simultaneously with others and easily share advice in parallel through the chat. Shall we start?
empty.collaborativeeditor.creation.title: Work together anywhere and anytime!
empty.collaborativewall.consultation: Ideal for organising or simply pinning all your ideas, the Collaborative Wall is an interactive virtual board. And as the name suggests, you can use it with others!
empty.collaborativewall.creation: Ideal for organising or simply pinning all your ideas, the Collaborative Wall is an interactive virtual board. And as the name suggests, you can use it with others!
empty.collaborativewall.creation.title: For post-it addicts
empty.conversation: With the Messaging app, start communicating with members of your network right now.
empty.conversation.title: Not a message in sight...
empty.filters: Oops, you unchecked all filters… Select a category to access content.
empty.filters.title: Who turned off the lights?
empty.forum.consultation: Want to suggest books for the library, share revision tips or give your view on the last lesson? Join rich and constructive conversations via the forum!
empty.forum.consultation.title: There are no discussions here yet…
empty.forum.creation: Not very inspired for the next school trips? Need suggestions for new library additions? Create a category, share it with the bright minds around you, and start discussions to share your brilliant ideas!
empty.forum.creation.title: Create discussion spaces for your network
empty.mindmap.consultation: With the mind map, ideas transform into structured diagrams. Reading notes, note-taking, oral presentations… everything is easier to remember.
empty.mindmap.consultation.title: A map to grow your ideas!
empty.mindmap.creation: Tired of letting your brilliant ideas slip away? The Mind Map app not only lets you note them down, but also connect all the related thoughts! A must-try.
empty.mindmap.creation.title: Let good ideas germinate!
empty.pages.consultation: Who said only coding geniuses could make websites? With the Pages app, you can easily create and publish content on a public or private site!
empty.pages.consultation.title: Mini websites just for you (or almost)
empty.pages.creation: No need to be a coding genius to create your site with Pages! Simply drag and drop content blocks. Make it public or private, it's your choice!
empty.pages.creation.title: Create your own websites in a few clicks
empty.pages.subfolder.title: This folder is empty...
empty.rack.consultation: The Locker app is used to submit or hand in homework. Be careful, once handed in to the teacher's personal locker, you can no longer modify your answers. Sure? Go for it!
empty.rack.consultation.title: Submit an assignment in one click
empty.rack.creation: Not a single document! You haven't deposited anything yet. Shall we get started?
empty.rack.creation.title: It's completely empty…
empty.schoolbook.child: Your child's teacher hasn't sent any notes in the contact book yet
empty.schoolbook.consultation: With the digital contact book, the teacher can easily communicate the most important information to you and read your replies in a few clicks!
empty.schoolbook.consultation.title: There are no notes in your book for the moment...
empty.schoolbook.creation: Need to communicate with parents? Send notes via the digital contact book! Access reading tracking and allow parents to reply directly. Simple and effective.
empty.schoolbook.creation.title: It's time to create your first note!
empty.schoolbook.shared: Create your note and give your colleagues the ability to manage it with you. Reading tracking, reminders, printing on slips… Everything becomes easier together!
empty.schoolbook.shared.title: There are no shared notes for the moment…
empty.scrapbook.consultation: Discover soon the multimedia notebook, an interactive slideshow with texts, sounds, illustrations and videos.
empty.scrapbook.consultation.title: Just a moment… There is no content yet.
empty.scrapbook.creation: With the Multimedia Notebook, bring your lessons and presentations to life. Texts, sounds, images or videos, finally a smart notebook!
empty.scrapbook.creation.title: It's too empty… Create your first multimedia notebook
empty.scrapbook.subfolder.title: This folder is empty...
empty.search: No content matches your search. Shall we try again?
empty.search.title: Nothing on the horizon
empty.sharebigfiles.consultation: The File Sender app lets you view the largest documents shared by your network.
empty.sharebigfiles.creation: Forget USB drives! The File Sender app lets you store large documents online and access them anywhere, for 30 days.
empty.sharebigfiles.title: Your documents, as if on a cloud…
empty.timeline.consultation: Merovingians, Carolingians, Capetians, the dynasties succeeded one another on the throne… Yes, but in what order? With the Timeline, memorise events more easily!
empty.timeline.consultation.title: Never lose track of events
empty.timeline.creation: The Timeline app has more than one trick up its sleeve. Create interactive murals, design biographies or create a project logbook. You're spoilt for choice!
empty.timeline.creation.title: Never lose track of events
empty.timeline.notifications: Lea published a Blog post, Enzo shared a Mind Map with you, Chloe wrote a message in the Forum. Find all your notifications in this News Feed soon.
empty.timeline.notifications.nofilters: Oops, you unchecked all filters... Select your favourite categories to access the most important notifications!
empty.timeline.notifications.noresults: There are no results. Check new filters to display your notifications.
empty.timeline.notifications.title: But, where did everyone go?
empty.timeline.subfolder.title: This folder is empty...
empty.trash.subfolder: There is nothing at all here...
empty.trash1: Zero. That is the astronomical number of items in this bin.
empty.trash2: Hmm… What are you looking for? Your bin is empty.
empty.trash3: Lesson no. 1: an empty bin can always be used to play basketball.
empty.trash4: Empty adj.: Space not occupied by matter. Example: Your bin is empty.
empty.trash5: It's completely empty… Not a shadow of a document in this bin.
empty.wiki.consultation: For those who love sharing their encyclopaedic knowledge, there is the Course and Wiki app! Alone or together, create content pages.
empty.wiki.consultation.title: Welcome to the course
empty.wiki.creation: You love sharing your encyclopaedic knowledge? This app is made for you! Expert or beginner, create pages, add contributors or not, write, and you're done! Shall we try?
empty.wiki.creation.title: Build your course
empty.workspace: Welcome to your document space, the cloud that lets you store all your resources online. Upload or download your documents, comment on them and easily share them with members of your network!
empty.workspace.apps: You added a dozen photos directly to your Blog and want to reuse them? No problem! Find them, neatly arranged, right here.
empty.workspace.apps.title: Oops, there is nothing on the shelf…
empty.workspace.shared: In this space, find all the documents you have shared with others, but also the documents to which you have been given access. Yes! It's wonderful to share.
empty.workspace.shared.title: Oops, there is nothing on the shelf…
empty.workspace.subfolder.title: This folder is empty...
empty.workspace.title: You don't have any documents yet. Let's change that!
